Built on Oklahoma Soil

Landscapers - Oklahoma City, OK started as a small, family-run business with a passion for outdoor spaces. We saw a need for reliable and skilled hardscaping services that could withstand Oklahoma's unique climate challenges.

Frequently Asked Questions

Get answers to the most common questions about our hardscaping contractor services.

What materials are best for patios in Oklahoma City?

Concrete pavers, natural stone, and stamped concrete are all excellent choices, offering durability and aesthetic appeal in Oklahoma's climate.

How long does patio installation take?

The duration varies depending on the size and complexity of the project, but most patios can be installed within 1-2 weeks.

Do I need a permit for patio installation?

In most cases, a permit is required for patio installation. We will handle the permit process for you.

Reviews From Our Hardscaping Contractor Customers

See what our satisfied customers have to say about their experience.

"Landscapers - Oklahoma City, OK did an amazing job on our new patio! They helped us choose the perfect pavers and the design is exactly what we wanted. The crew was professional and efficient, and the finished product is beautiful. Highly recommend!"

Sarah M. Patio Installation

"We had a problem with erosion in our backyard, and Landscapers - Oklahoma City, OK built a retaining wall that solved the problem perfectly. The wall looks great and is very sturdy. There was a minor communication issue during scheduling, but they quickly resolved it."

David B. Retaining Wall

"Our old driveway was cracked and uneven, so we hired Landscapers - Oklahoma City, OK to install a new one. They did a fantastic job! The new driveway is smooth, durable, and looks great. The team was professional and courteous throughout the entire process."

Jessica L. Driveway Installation
